title: helichrysum cespitosum
intro: Helichrysum cespitosum, also known as rough helichrysum or yellow salsify, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and coarse, hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene compounds. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum cespitosum have been found to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, making it a valuable herb for overall health and well-being. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
